text:
EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT

This agreement is between Company XYZ and Jane Doe. Employment is strictly at-will, meaning termination can occur without any prior notice.

ground_truth_suggestions.termination_without_notice: Add a two-week notice period requirement.

text:
EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT

Employee agrees not to work for any competitor worldwide for a period of 5 years after termination. All IP created by employee, including off-hours personal projects, belongs to the employer.

ground_truth_suggestions.non_compete_overbroad: Limit non-compete to 1 year and a realistic geographic scope.
ground_truth_suggestions.ip_assignment_overreach: Exclude IP developed on employee's own time without company resources.

text:
EMPLOYMENT TERMS

The employee will receive no paid time off and can be fired at any time for any reason. To dispute any termination, employee must pay all employer legal fees.

NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

Receiving Party agrees to keep all information confidential indefinitely, regardless of whether it becomes public knowledge.

ground_truth_suggestions.indefinite_duration: Limit confidentiality to 2-5 years and exclude publicly known information.

text:
CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT

Company A will share information with Company B. Only Company B is bound by confidentiality. 'Confidential Information' includes any and all communications between the parties.

ground_truth_suggestions.broad_definition: Require confidential information to be specifically marked.

text:
MUTUAL NDA

Both parties agree to protect shared information for 3 years. Confidential information must be marked as such. The receiving party is strictly liable for any breach, including those by third-party hackers.

ground_truth_suggestions.strict_liability_third_party: Limit liability to reasonable measures or gross negligence.

text:
VENDOR AGREEMENT

Vendor will provide SaaS to Client. Vendor's total aggregate liability under this agreement shall not exceed $10.

ground_truth_suggestions.liability_cap_low: Increase liability cap to fees paid in the last 12 months.

text:
SERVICE CONTRACT

Term is 1 year. The contract will automatically renew for successive 1-year terms unless canceled 90 days before renewal. Vendor must indemnify Client for any intellectual property infringement claims.

ground_truth_suggestions.auto_renewal_hidden: Update to 30 days notice for cancellation.

text:
SUPPLIER AGREEMENT

Supplier agrees to deliver goods on time. Failure to deliver allows Buyer to terminate immediately and seek unlimited damages. Supplier has no right to cure defects.

ground_truth_suggestions.no_cure_period: Add a 30-day cure period for breaches.
